title: Situation
description: DERIVED. The output of the situation engine: a flood of raw alarms collapsed into ONE root-cause situation. Carries the grouped alarms (nothing hidden), the root + affected assets, the causal path, and the ordered evidence. The Calm Card is rendered from this.

situation_type.description: SCREAMING_SNAKE type, e.g. MOTOR_MECHANICAL_OVERLOAD. Drives Calm Card copy + action envelope.

root_asset_id.description: The asset the DAG ranks as the root cause.

confidence.description: Bucketed confidence (the underlying numeric breakdown is stored in evidence/audit, not hidden).

grouped_alarm_ids.description: Every raw alarm folded into this situation. NOTHING is hidden — these remain individually viewable with receipts.

affected_asset_ids.description: Downstream assets shown as effects (amber), not causes.

causal_path.description: Ordered asset ids from root through effects, e.g. [MTR-301, BUS-101, INV-102]. Drives the numbered path overlay on the map.

traversed_edges.description: Causal-graph edge ids the traversal followed (the audit trail of HOW the root was reached).

evidence.description: Time-ordered evidence items. The first is the 'first signal'.

reason.description: Plain-language why this is evidence, e.g. 'Motor current rose first'.
